channel.title: Holidays on Villa de Tara
channel.description: Recent content in Holidays on Villa de Tara

item.title: New Year 2024
item.description: The New Year has arrived, bringing with it a celebration of our first six months living in Crete. After spending the first part of last year planning and executing our move here, the second part was no less hectic! A lot has happened around the house since the summer, and I will update you with these over the next few days. There are more exciting changes to come which we will share with you as we move through the year.
